channel.title: Pumpprice.live | Daily Fuel Insights
channel.description: Automated daily fuel price comparisons and expert fuel-saving guides.

item.title: NEW GUIDE: The Airport Rental Car Fuel Trap: How to Save £15 on Your Next Trip
item.description: Don't get caught out by airport petrol station prices. We reveal the cheapest places to fill up before returning your rental car at major UK airports.

item.title: Fuel Savings: Belfast is 7.2p cheaper than UK average!
item.description: The average price of Petrol (E10) in Belfast is currently 146.9p. Compared to the national average of 153.9p, residents are saving 7.2p per litre. Check the live map for the cheapest stations at https://pumpprice.live

item.title: Price Alert: Brighton fuel is 2.6p more expensive than UK average.
item.description: The average price of Petrol (E10) in Brighton is currently 156.9p. Compared to the national average of 153.9p, residents are paying extra 2.6p per litre. Check the live map for the cheapest stations at https://pumpprice.live
